title: tarenna drummondii
intro: Tarenna drummondii, also known as Drummond's tarenna, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to provide health benefits such as reducing fever and treating wounds. Tarenna drummondii is often prepared as an infusion or decoction, and its leaves and stems can be used to make herbal teas, extracts, or tinctures.
